title: responseGetMatchedOffersDataBySKU
description: Array of matched offers data by SKU.

productId.description: The unique identifier for the product.

skuId.description: The unique identifier for the product SKU.

nameComplete.description: The complete name of the product.
nameComplete.example: Blusa Cardigan Manga Longa Vestem - Feminina - CINZA G

mainImage.description: Schema for the main product image.

imagePath.description: The file path of the main product image.

sellersOffers.description: Array of offers from different sellers.

items.description: Schema for individual seller offer data.

sellerId.description: The unique identifier for the seller.

sellerSkuId.description: The unique identifier for the seller's SKU.

salesChannelOffer.description: Array of offers on different sales channels from the same seller.

items.description: Schema for individual sales channel offer data.

salesChannelId.description: The unique identifier for the sales channel.

salesChannelName.description: The name of the sales channel.

listPrice.description: The list price of the product.

priceWithoutDiscount.description: The offer price without any discount.

availableQuantity.description: The available quantity of the product.
